title: Applications of Genomics and Transcriptomics in Precision Medicine for Myopia Control or Prevention.
author: Jiang L Goh DX Koh JHZ Chan X Brennan NA Barathi VA Hoang QV
content: S-EPMC10046175 PMC10046175 Applications of Genomics and Transcriptomics in Precision Medicine for Myopia Control or Prevention. Myopia is a globally emerging concern accompanied by multiple medical and socio-economic burdens with no well-established causal treatment to control thus far. The study
